title: Archaeologist Agent v0.1: Worldview OSINT Compressor
description: Create an agent that ingests all logs/*.txt intel files, compresses them into a unified operational worldview per Roemmele's 'Ark' and Sidhu's OSINT principles. Output: WORLDVIEW_OSINT.md. This agent will use Ollama for local processing (fallback to Umbrel) and maintain a living Obsidian knowledge base.
